Written for “Lessons from Transformational Medical Advances” Course

With Srikant M. Datar. Tales of Life-changing Innovations: Too Simple to be Safe? | Note on the Development of Fecal Transplants HBS Background Note 321-065, March 2021. (Revised April 2021).

With Srikant M. Datar and Katherine Stebbins. Tales of Life-changing Innovations: Early Detection, Precise Diagnoses | Note on the Development of Mammography (though 2000) HBS Background Note 321-064, November 2020. (Revised May 2021).
